## Summary

## Accountability

- [ ] I am responsible for the content of this contribution.
- [ ] My commits use human DCO sign-off where required.
- [ ] I did not list an AI tool as a `Signed-off-by` signer.

## AI Assistance Disclosure

<!-- If AI tools materially assisted this contribution, disclose them here and/or in commit trailers. -->

Suggested trailer format:

```text
Assisted-by: GitHub Copilot
```

AI assistance disclosure is about transparency, not authorship detection. Maintainers review the contribution on its merits, and humans remain accountable for DCO/sign-off.
